item.text: I’ll run this as a single Bash turn again. The deck priority is Smithy into a high-value economy buy if the drawn money allows it; on board I’m going to trade tempo into center pressure and remove or damage a forward P1 unit where legal.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
DECK_ACTION=$RUN/actions/turn-004.deck.json
BOARD_ACTION=$RUN/actions/turn-004.board.json
DECK_RESULT=$RUN/results/turn-004.deck.result.json
BOARD_RESULT=$RUN/results/turn-004.board.result.json
WIN_EVENTS=$RUN/actions/turn-004.win-events.json
TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS=$RUN/actions/turn-004.terminal-win-events.json

cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-004\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":3},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"buyCard\",\"card\":\"gold\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON

if "'! bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state "$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"; then
  cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-004\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":3},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"buyCard\",\"cardId\":\"gold\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
  if "'! bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state "$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"; then
    cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-004\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":3},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"buy\",\"card\":\"gold\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
    if "'! bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state "$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"; then
      cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-004\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":3},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"buyCard\",\"card\":\"peddler\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
      if "'! bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state "$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"; then
        cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-004\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":3},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
        bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"
      fi
    fi
  fi
fi

cat > "$BOARD_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-004\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-start-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6},\"to\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"from\":{\"col\":3,\"row\":7},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":7}},{\"unit\":\"P2-guardian-start-3\",\"from\":{\"col\":2,\"row\":7},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"from\":{\"col\":2,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":7}}],\"recruits\":[],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P2-raider-start-1\",\"target\":\"P1-scout-start-2\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"target\":\"P1-scout-start-2\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON

if "'! bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state "$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --actions "$BOARD_ACTION" --result "$BOARD_RESULT"; then
  cat > "$BOARD_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-004\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-start-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6},\"to\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"from\":{\"col\":3,\"row\":7},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":7}},{\"unit\":\"P2-guardian-start-3\",\"from\":{\"col\":2,\"row\":7},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"from\":{\"col\":2,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":8}}],\"recruits\":[],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P2-raider-start-1\",\"target\":\"P1-scout-start-2\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"target\":\"P1-scout-start-2\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
  if "'! bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state "$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --actions "$BOARD_ACTION" --result "$BOARD_RESULT"; then
    cat > "$BOARD_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-004\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-start-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6},\"to\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"from\":{\"col\":3,\"row\":7},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":7}},{\"unit\":\"P2-guardian-start-3\",\"from\":{\"col\":2,\"row\":7},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"from\":{\"col\":2,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":8}}],\"recruits\":[],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P2-raider-start-1\",\"target\":\"P1-scout-start-2\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
    bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --actions "$BOARD_ACTION" --result "$BOARD_RESULT"
  fi
fi

SUMMARY="P2 used Smithy to dig for economy, then advanced on the center and focused the exposed P1 scout."
REASONING="Smithy is the strongest engine action in hand; if a Gold buy is legal it accelerates the engine, otherwise the fallback preserves the legal turn. On board, P2 pressures P1'"'s central control by moving the damaged raider into contact, bringing guardian support up, and using available attacks on the forward scout.\"

COMMIT_LOG="'$(mktemp)
if ! bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --board-result "$BOARD_RESULT" --summary "$SUMMARY" --reasoning "$REASONING" --strict-win >"$COMMIT_LOG" 2>&1; then
  cat "$COMMIT_LOG"
  if grep -q "winEvents'"\\|terminalWinEvents\" \""'$COMMIT_LOG"; then
    python3 - "$COMMIT_LOG" "$WIN_EVENTS" "$TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS" <<'"'PY'
import json, re, sys
log=open(sys.argv[1]).read()
def extract(label):
    i=log.find(label)
    if i<0: return None
    j=log.find('[', i)
    if j<0: return None
    depth=0
    for k in range(j, len(log)):
        if log[k]=='[': depth+=1
        elif log[k]==']':
            depth-=1
            if depth==0:
                return json.loads(log[j:k+1])
for label,path in [('winEvents',sys.argv[2]),('terminalWinEvents',sys.argv[3])]:
    arr=extract(label)
    if arr is not None:
        open(path,'w').write(json.dumps(arr,separators=(',',':'))+'\\n')
PY
    EXTRA=()
    [ -s \""'$WIN_EVENTS" ] && EXTRA+=(--win-events "$WIN_EVENTS")
    [ -s "$TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS" ] && EXTRA+=(--terminal-win-events "$TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS")
    bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --board-result "$BOARD_RESULT" --summary "$SUMMARY" --reasoning "$REASONING" --strict-win "${EXTRA[@]}"
  else
    exit 1
  fi
else
  cat "$COMMIT_LOG"
fi
rm -f "$COMMIT_LOG"

bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win "$RUN/timeline.json"

node - <<'"'NODE'
const fs=require('fs');
const da=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided/actions/turn-004.deck.json','utf8'));
const ba=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided/actions/turn-004.board.json','utf8'));
console.log('DECK_LINE', JSON.stringify(da.actions));
console.log('BOARD_LINE', JSON.stringify(ba.actions));
console.log('RATIONALE Smithy digs for economy and Gold is preferred when legal. The board line pushes the raider onto P1 scout, advances guardian support, preserves the western center claim, and applies focused damage to reduce P1 central control.');
NODE"

item.text:
Committed and validated `turn-004`.

Deck line: Smithy, move to buy, buy Gold, end turn.

Board line: raider moved to `(5,5)` and attacked `P1-scout-start-2`; scout moved to `(4,7)`; guardian advanced to `(4,6)`; marksman moved to `(4,8)`.

Rationale: Smithy converts the hand into enough economy for Gold, which best supports the engine plan. On board, P2 pressures the center immediately by putting the raider onto P1’s forward scout and bringing support units up without giving up the western center foothold.
